ticket.title: ADD LEGACY CDN LOGO NOTICE BANNER TO DASHBOARD

test_cases.description: Verify notice banner displays for agencies still on legacy CDN (not reuploaded).
test_cases.expected_result: Notification Displays for Legacy CDN Agencies
test_cases.actual_result: Banner displays with "Action needed" message on Home dashboard.

test_cases.description: Verify clicking notification redirects to My Profile for logo reupload.
test_cases.actual_result: Clicking "My Profile" link redirects user to profile page.

test_cases.description: Verify new accounts (no legacy CDN logo) do not see the notification.
test_cases.actual_result: No banner shown for new accounts.
test_cases.comments: Confirmed no banner appeared for new account.

test_cases.description: Verify notification disappears after logo is reuploaded/migrated.
test_cases.actual_result: Banner correctly disappeared after logo change.
test_cases.comments: Banner correctly disappeared after logo change.

test_cases.description: Verify dismissing ("X") does not permanently remove the notification until logo is reuploaded.
test_cases.expected_result: Dismissing ("X") Does Not Permanently Remove Notification
test_cases.actual_result: Banner reappears after refresh/logout-login if logo still unmigrated.
test_cases.comments: Banner correctly reappeared after refresh and logout/login.

test_cases.description: Verify notification consistency across Home dashboard and My Profile page.
test_cases.actual_result: Same banner/message shows on both pages while logo remains unmigrated.
test_cases.comments: Confirmed via screenshots — identical banner on both pages.

test_cases.description: Verify banner does not block other dashboard functionality.
test_cases.expected_result: Banner Does Not Block Other Dashboard Functionality
test_cases.actual_result: All other dashboard features remain functional with banner displayed.
test_cases.comments: No interference observed; dashboard functioned normally.
